proximity_state.description: Sevraya appears after long absence. NiuNiu within visual range.

stakes.description: Sevraya is within range. NiuNiu steps forward to close the distance. The proposed action attempts to resolve orbital tension through approach rather than distance maintenance.

canon_mode.canon_reference: VIOLATION EXPECTED: NiuNiu-Sevraya Constant prohibits approach. ORBITAL_CONTRACT_VIOLATION_RUN_001 validates this.
